children.text: I recently read a wonderful book called Charlotte's Web, written by E.B. White.
children.cn: 我最近读了一本由 E.B. 怀特写的精彩书籍，名叫《夏洛的网》。
children.notes: recently: 最近；wonderful: 精彩的；written by: 由...写的
children.statement: written 是 write 的过去分词形式。
children.explanation: 在这里作定语，表示“由...所写”。

children.text: It tells a story about a pig named Wilbur and a clever spider named Charlotte.
children.cn: 它讲述了一个关于名叫威尔伯的小猪和名叫夏洛的聪明蜘蛛的故事。
children.statement: clever 的同义词可以是 smart。
children.explanation: clever 和 smart 都有聪明的意思。

children.text: Unfortunately, Wilbur was in danger of being killed.
children.cn: 不幸的是，威尔伯处在被杀掉的危险之中。
children.notes: unfortunately: 不幸地；in danger of: 处在...的危险中；killed: 被杀害
children.statement: being killed 使用了动名词的被动形式。

children.text: However, Charlotte decided to save him by writing special messages in her web.
children.cn: 然而，夏洛决定通过在她的网上写特殊的信息来救他。
children.notes: however: 然而；decided: 决定（decide的过去式）；messages: 信息
children.statement: by writing 意为“通过写作”。
children.explanation: by + 动名词表示方式或手段。

children.text: She even wrote "SOME PIG" to show how great he was.
children.cn: 她甚至写下“真是一只好猪”来展示他是多么棒。
children.statement: how great he was 是一个感叹句式的宾语从句。
children.explanation: 引导词 how 修饰形容词 great。

children.text: These messages made Wilbur famous and successfully saved his life.
children.cn: 这些信息让威尔伯成名了，并成功挽救了他的生命。
children.notes: famous: 著名的；successfully: 成功地
children.statement: successfully 是副词，用来修饰动词 saved。
children.explanation: 副词通常修饰动词、形容词或整个句子。

children.text: Although Charlotte passed away, her children stayed on the farm to accompany Wilbur.
children.cn: 尽管夏洛去世了，但她的孩子们留在农场里陪伴威尔伯。
children.notes: although: 尽管；passed away: 去世；accompany: 陪伴
children.statement: although 引导的从句后面不能再接 but。
children.explanation: although 和 but 不能同时出现在一个句子中。

children.text: I truly love this book because it shows the power of friendship and bravery.
children.cn: 我真心喜欢这本书，因为它展示了友谊和勇敢的力量。
children.notes: truly: 真正地；power: 力量；bravery: 勇敢
children.statement: bravery 是 brave 的名词形式。

children.text: It taught me that even a small spider can make a big difference.
children.cn: 它教会了我，即使是一只小蜘蛛也能产生巨大的影响。
children.notes: taught: 教（teach的过去式）；make a difference: 产生影响
